checkout-eu verified: smoke checklist passed (version check, basket totals, retry flow).

args.subject: Checkout v9.2.0: rollout complete
args.body: Checkout v9.2.0 has been rolled out to all environments in sequence: checkout-staging, checkout-eu, checkout-us. Each environment passed the smoke checklist (version check, basket totals, payment-intent retry) before the next deploy proceeded.
